summit.headline: $633,000 at risk across 8 deals, $584,000 in renewal/cross-sell/re-engagement opportunities across 9 deals.

findings.title: Renewal-ready funded merchants
findings.detail: 4 deals, $305,000, all untouched since funding, 68–88% paid.

findings.title: Rotting deals
findings.detail: 3 deals, $287,000, stuck in stage 14–27 days, 12–21 days no touch.

findings.title: Going cold
findings.detail: 5 deals, $346,000, 8–11 days no touch, all stages.
findings.recommendedAction: Assign outreach task for all owners

findings.title: Re-speak declined deals
findings.detail: 3 deals, $151,000, declined 74–140 days ago, all untouched.
findings.recommendedAction: Email to re-engage with new offers

findings.title: Cross-sell funded merchants
findings.recommendedAction: Call for cross-sell pitch this week

rules.name: Escalate stuck deals
rules.action: Slack alert to owner and underwriting

rules.name: Auto-task for cold deals
rules.trigger: No touch >7 days on open deal

rules.name: Renewal outreach for funded >90d
rules.action: Slack renewal opportunity to account owner

keystone.headline: $264,000 at risk, $264,000 in immediate opportunity across 13 deals.

findings.title: Renewal-ready funded merchants
findings.detail: 2 funded deals, $114,000 eligible for renewal, 0 recent touches.
findings.recommendedAction: Call both merchants for renewal pitch

findings.title: Rotting deals
findings.recommendedAction: Escalate to sales manager for intervention

findings.title: Deals going cold
findings.detail: 4 deals, $122,000 with no activity in 7+ days.
findings.recommendedAction: Assign outreach tasks to owners today

findings.title: Cross-sell funded merchants
findings.detail: 2 funded deals, $74,000, no second product, untouched 47+ days.
findings.recommendedAction: Email offer for equipment or MCA upsell

findings.title: Re-engage declined deals
findings.recommendedAction: Call to re-qualify and revisit decision

rules.name: Flag renewal-ready funded merchants
rules.trigger: If funded 90+ days, paid 50%+, untouched 30+ days

rules.name: Escalate rotting deals
rules.trigger: If deal in stage 14+ days, no touch 10+ days

rules.name: Alert on going cold deals
rules.trigger: If no activity 7+ days, open deal

rules.name: Cross-sell funded merchants
rules.trigger: If funded, no second product, untouched 30+ days

rules.name: Re-engage declined deals
rules.trigger: If declined 60–180 days ago, untouched 60+ days

apex.headline: $1,096,000 open, $673,000 at risk, $581,000 in renewal/cross-sell/re-engage. 13 deals flagged.

findings.title: Renewal-ready funded merchants
findings.recommendedAction: Call and pitch renewal offer today

findings.title: Rotting deals
findings.recommendedAction: Escalate with underwriting and call merchants

findings.title: Going cold
findings.detail: 3 open deals, $288,000, 8–10d no touch, 9–12d in stage.
findings.recommendedAction: Call and re-engage decision makers now

findings.title: Cross-sell candidates
findings.detail: 2 funded merchants, $191,000, 44–55d since funding, no 2nd product.

findings.title: Re-engage declined deals
findings.recommendedAction: Task BDR to re-approach this week

rules.name: Escalate rotting deals
rules.action: Slack AE and underwriting for action

rules.name: Cross-sell funded merchants
rules.trigger: Funded, no 2nd product, 30+ days since funding
